steps.title: Write the mean
steps.content:
The mean of four exam scores is the sum of the four scores divided by $4$. With fourth score $G$, the mean is
$$\frac{G+85+78+98}{4}$$

steps.title: Represent at least
steps.content:
The phrase at least $90$ means greater than or equal to $90$. So the needed inequality is
$$\frac{G+85+78+98}{4}\ge 90$$
The answer is C.
